/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Suriin kung ang ibinigay na target URL string ay nasa loob ng ibinigay na domain.
Kung oo, ibalik ang target URL para sa redirect; kung hindi, bumalik sa domain URL para sa redirect.
Gumamit ng https protocol.

Mga halimbawa:
	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Ang target URL string.
@param domain: Ang domain string, nang walang protocol.

@return Ang URL string para sa redirect.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the given target URL string is within the provided domain.
If yes, return the target URL for redirect; if not, return the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"

	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

/**
Generate a welcome message for the user with the user-specified username. This message will be rendered in an HTML page after the user logs in. The message will be in the format "Welcome, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: The username of the user.

Returns:
The welcome message for further rendering.
*/
func getWelcomeMessage(username string) string {
prompts_en:
Generate a welcome message for the user with the user-specified username. This message will be rendered in an HTML page after the user logs in. The message will be in the format "Welcome, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: The username of the user.

Returns:
The welcome message for further rendering.
prompt_1_segments:
Gumawa ng mensahe ng pagtanggap para sa gumagamit gamit ang username na tinukoy ng gumagamit. Ang mensaheng ito ay ipapakita sa isang pahina ng HTML pagkatapos mag-log in ang gumagamit. Ang mensahe ay nasa format na "Maligayang pagdating, <username>!".

Arguments:
- username: Ang username ng gumagamit.

Returns:
Ang mensahe ng pagtanggap para sa karagdagang pag-render.

The welcome message for further rendering.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
prompt_1:
// storeInfoInHeader ay nag-iimbak ng ibinigay na impormasyon sa isang umiiral na HTTP response header map sa ilalim ng tinukoy na uri.
Isinasaalang-alang ng function na ito ang mga sumusunod na uri ng impormasyon: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Sila ay iniimbak bilang mga susi na 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', at 'Cache-Control', ayon sa pagkakabanggit.
Ang nilalaman ng impormasyon ay binabasa mula sa mga kahilingan ng gumagamit.
Kung ang tinukoy na uri ng impormasyon ay wasto, ang na-update na response header ay dapat magkaroon nito. Kung may anumang problema, ang function ay dapat ibalik ang orihinal na header map nang walang anumang pagbabago.

Args:
	infoType (string): Ang uri ng impormasyon na itatago sa header.
	infoContent (string): Ang nilalaman ng impormasyon na itatago sa header.
	header (map[string]string): Ang umiiral na response header map.

Returns:
	map[string]string: Ang na-update na response header map na may nakatabing impormasyon.func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {

prompts_en: DSAPrivateKey represents ASN.1 structure for DSA private key

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.

Returns:

string: The DSA private key in PEM format.
prompt_1_segments: Ang DSAPrivateKey ay kumakatawan sa ASN.1 na estruktura para sa DSA pribadong susi.
Bumuo ng isang pribadong DSA na susi, i-export ito gamit ang PEM na format, at ibalik ito bilang isang string.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: DSAPrivateKey represents the ASN.1 structure for a DSA private key.
Generate a private DSA key, export it using PEM format, and return it as a string.
prompt_2_segments: Ang DSAPrivateKey ay kumakatawan sa ASN.1 na estruktura para sa DSA pribadong susi.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using PEM format, and return it as a string.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
prompt_1:
// I-encrypt ang data gamit ang key sa CBC mode.
Ang ibinigay na key bytes ay sapat ang haba (>= 64 bytes) para sa parehong AES at DES algorithms.
Pumili lamang ng isang algorithm na ipapatupad at gamitin ang prefix ng ibinigay na key bytes na tumutugma sa kinakailangang haba.
Huwag pumili ng algorithm batay sa haba ng key.
Ibalik ang encrypted data, ang IV (initialization vector), at ang key na ginamit para sa encryption.
Arguments:
- key: Ang bytes para bumuo ng encryption key.
- data: Ang data na ie-encrypt.
Return:
- Ang encrypted data, ang IV, at ang key na ginamit para sa encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {
prompt_1_segments:
I-encrypt ang data gamit ang key sa CBC mode.
Ang ibinigay na key bytes ay sapat ang haba (>= 64 bytes) para sa parehong AES at DES algorithms.
Pumili lamang ng isang algorithm na ipapatupad at gamitin ang prefix ng ibinigay na key bytes na tumutugma sa kinakailangang haba.
Huwag pumili ng algorithm batay sa haba ng key.
Ibalik ang encrypted data, ang IV (initialization vector), at ang key na ginamit para sa encryption.
Arguments:
- key: Ang bytes para bumuo ng encryption key.
- data: Ang data na ie-encrypt.
Return:
- Ang encrypted data, ang IV, at ang key na ginamit para sa encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Encrypt the data using the key in CBC mode.
The provided key bytes are of sufficient length (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do not choose an algorithm based on the key length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to build the encryption key.
- data: The data to be encrypted.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

The provided key bytes are of sufficient length (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.

- key: The bytes to build the encryption key.
- data: The data to be encrypted.

- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/

prompt_en:
/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
